# ~~parseSseResponse()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function parseSseResponse(response: Response): Promise<unknown>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts:151](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts#L151)

Parses an SSE response by extracting the first `data:` line and
JSON-parsing it.

## Parameters

| Parameter  | Type                                                                            | Description                                                                                                 |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `response` | [`Response`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference) | The raw [Response](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference) from an SSE endpoint. |

## Returns

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`unknown`>

A promise resolving to the parsed JSON payload.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  The Streamable HTTP
transport replaced SSE; use `StreamableHTTPClientTransport`
for E2E transport tests.

## Remarks

Reads the full response body as text, splits on newlines, and
finds the first line beginning with `"data: "`.  Falls back to
parsing the entire body if no `data:` prefix is found.
